items.summary: Redesign the 'RK Industrial Park' logo/wordmark area in frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx for stronger visual impact and hierarchy. Currently the brand name wraps awkwardly across two lines ('RK INDUSTRIAL' / 'PARK'). Fix it to display on a single line without wrapping. Increase the font size and weight of the wordmark, apply a consistent typographic treatment (e.g., 'RK INDUSTRIAL PARK' in bold Inter with tracked uppercase lettering), ensure 'RK' or the full name uses the industrial blue accent (#1D4ED8) or a contrasting white/blue split to create visual hierarchy. The icon/logo mark to the left should be properly sized and vertically aligned with the wordmark. The result should feel like a confident, institutional brand lockup — not a wrapped overflow.
